SHORT - Enum constant in enum class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.TagType
Represents a signed 16-bit Short integer value.
ShortTag - Class in me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
Represents an NBT tag holding a single short value.
ShortTag(Short) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.ShortTag
Constructs a new unnamed tag with the specified short value.
ShortTag(String, Short) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.ShortTag
Constructs a new tag with the specified name and short value.
size() - Method in class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.ListTag
 
STRING - Enum constant in enum class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.TagType
Represents a UTF-8 String value.
StringTag - Class in me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
Represents an NBT tag holding a String value.
StringTag(String) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.StringTag
Constructs a new unnamed tag with the specified string value.
StringTag(String, String) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.StringTag
Constructs a new tag with the specified name and string value.
